capability: structural-reveal discrimination — isolate a line whose bond joins two previously-separate regions of the entity graph
claim: A bond between two STANDING entities sitting in separate graph components is a structural reveal; the interior connectivity channel (bridgeSurprise) fires maximally on it and ~0 on surface-matched controls (adjacent re-bond, fresh entity), while the mass-based one-surprise (bayesBits) does NOT isolate it (ranks fresh-mass lines above it); the connectivity reading is invariant to a surface emphasis cue.
stimulus_shape: text · discrimination+invariance · L3 · whole-reading · target CON
verdict: CONFIRMED — controls dark (adj=0, fresh=0), bridge unique-argmax on the reveal (1.0), bayes argmax elsewhere (gap real), surface-invariant (unmarked==marked)
mechanism: connectivity collapse over the CON/SIG bond graph: a bond's endpoints in different components -> 1, same-component geodesic delta -> (delta-1)/Dinf, adjacent -> 0; endpoints resolved through the CAUSAL SYN-merge identity quotient (the engine's own union-find, restricted to sentIdx<=cursor) so a reveal that names a standing entity by a new surface form is seen
fix_layer: interior (genome) — new src/core/bridge.js, exported from src/core/index.js beside surpriseAt; wired into src/perceiver/reading.js as an OPT-IN channel readingAt({bridge:true}) so the default path is byte-identical
root_cause_of_gap: the mass one-surprise (surprise.js) has no atom for connectivity — a bond among standing entities is a tiny mass deposit; the structural convergence leaves no trace in the figure field. The existing diagnostic (scripts/reveal-discrimination.mjs bridgeSurprise) located this but lived only in the read-only harness AND keyed on raw surface ids, so it MISSED short-name reveals and faked a 2-hop separation on adjacent controls.
parity: npm test 649->658 (9-test lock added), default readingAt byte-identical (bridge opt-in)
generalization: 194/194 lines of the original reveal-stimulus.json reproduce the prior raw-id bridge column EXACTLY (no regression); coref-resolution is a strict superset — identical where reveals use full names, strictly better on short-name reveals
omnimodal: CONFIRMED on a pure-operator log (no text/parser): cross-component bond -> 1.0, adjacent -> 0, SYN-coref reveal -> 1.0 — the mechanism reads only operators, so any organ emitting CON/SIG/SYN inherits it
scope_holds: any modality whose organ emits bonds (CON/SIG) and identity merges (SYN); structural reveals that join graph regions; reveals naming a standing entity by a new surface form
scope_fails: a reveal carried by NO bond (a pure predication/contradiction leaves connectivity unchanged — the enacted significance loop's province); convergence the weak SVO parser does not draw as a bond or shared object (front-end limit, not the channel's)

capability: adaptive novelty reserve — the mass the reader holds for an as-yet-unseen atom tracks the γ-decayed RATE of newcomer arrivals, instead of a hand-set constant blind to it
claim: The reserve probability p(novel) should track recent novelty rate. Under the live FIXED reserve (NOVELTY=1.0) it is a function of accumulated figure mass alone; at MATCHED mass it is identical whether the reader just saw a burst of newcomers, one entity recurring, or three OLD entities recurring (distinct-count + surface activity matched to the burst). Under the ADAPTIVE reserve (the γ-decayed newcomer rate fed as the novelty amplitude through the UNCHANGED Born step) p(novel) is HIGH after a burst and LOW after a confirmation stretch, and the aged-recurrence control groups with one-recurrence — proving recency-of-introduction, not distinct-count.
stimulus_shape: text+tonal · discrimination+invariance · L3 significance · across-a-window · target the reserve atom
verdict: CONFIRMED — fixed reserve blind (pNovel=[0.25,0.25,0.25] in both senses), adaptive splits (newcomers 0.5 vs one_recurs/old_recur 0.2), loud-surface control caught (old_recur groups with one_recurs), omnimodal (identical in text and music)
mechanism: recentNoveltyReserve(events,cursor,{gamma}): the γ-decayed count of INS FIRST-appearances under the same kernel the figure field uses (w=γ^(at-1-s)). It is an AMPLITUDE only — threaded into surpriseAt/forwardDist/pNovel exactly where the constant sat, so the square-and-normalise law stays fixed for every sense and only the reserved mass becomes context-sensitive (the 'context enters at the amplitude, the law stays put' discipline)
fix_layer: interior (genome) — new recentNoveltyReserve in src/core/surprise.js, exported from src/core/index.js; threaded into src/perceiver/reading.js as an OPT-IN amplitude readingAt({reserve:'adaptive'}); pNovel surfaced under the existing opts.forward gate. Default path byte-identical
root_cause_of_gap: the reserve was a hand-set literal (NOVELTY_RESERVE=1.0) — a constant in the predictive path standing in for a quantity the signal teaches. It is blind to the newcomer rate because it has no term for first-appearances; it only ever divides by accumulated mass, so 'three newcomers just arrived' and 'the same cast recurred' produce the same certainty about the unseen
parity: npm test 676->681 (5-test lock added), default readingAt byte-identical (reserve opt-in; pNovel only under forward)
generalization: re-ran exp-0001 (structural-reveal) — still CONFIRMED, bridge column unchanged [0,0,0,0,0,0,0,1] and the bayes gap intact; the fix is opt-in so every confirmed capability on the default path is preserved by construction (681/681 green)
omnimodal: CONFIRMED in two organs (text via parseText, tonal via ingestMusic) AND on a pure-operator log — recentNoveltyReserve reads only INS first-appearances, so any organ that admits entities inherits the same adaptive reserve; a fix that helped one sense would have leaked
scope_holds: any modality whose organ admits entities (emits INS); the reserve over the figure field (pNovel) and over the proposition field (surpriseAt/forwardDist); horizons where newcomer recency is the signal
scope_fails: a degenerate opening with no prior INS at all (nu=0) falls back to the non-informative unit reserve — the honest boundary, not a tuned parameter; senses whose organ admits no recurring entity (e.g. the frequency organ, where every note is its own id) have no confirmation stretch to contrast, so the reserve runs permanently high there
